text: Tsumiko Mark voice is a free text-to-speech tool Provide voice synthesis service Support many languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, German, Spanish, Arabic, etc. More than 50 languages and more than 300 languages You can use it to make video dubbing It can also be used to read audiobooks or download audio files for commercial purposes completely free As an excellent voice-to-speech tool Tsumiko can easily convert text to voice

chunks.text: Tsumiko Mark voice is a free text-to-speech tool
Support many languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, German, Spanish, Arabic, etc.
More than 50 languages and more than 300 languages

It can also be used to read audiobooks or download audio files for commercial purposes
